nodes.name: Configure Job
nodes.notes:
REQUIRED: lang (en or hi).
Set pipelineApiBase (not /generate). Host n8n: http://127.0.0.1:8765

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ stage: 'script', lang: $json.lang, theme: $json.theme, themesCsv: $json.themesCsv, duration: $json.duration, tier: $json.tier }) }}

nodes.name: Upload Complete
nodes.notes: Extracts video ID from Upload to YouTube output. Fails fast if upload did not return an id.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ run_id: $('Upload Complete').first().json.runId, video_id: $('Upload Complete').first().json.youtubeVideoId, title: $('Parse Pipeline Result').item.json.title }) }}

nodes.name: Wait Before Comment
nodes.notes: 90s delay so YouTube can finish processing before the engagement comment is posted.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ snippet: { videoId: $('Upload Complete').first().json.youtubeVideoId, topLevelComment: { snippet: { textOriginal: ($('Parse Pipeline Result').item.json.youtubeComment || 'Which part did you like the most? Tell us in the comments!') } } } }) }}
